title: Doctrinally richest: 13 named subspaces × 10 modes; claim-evidence-confidence governance
public_claim: Prism Observatory is the doctrinally richest internal chamber inside Red Team Lab.
distinctive_mechanism: It defines thirteen named subspaces across ten modes, claim-evidence-confidence governance, and state-of-reasoning categories for what is known, inferred, assumed, contradicted, read, unread, accepted, and reopened.
use_value: It matters because the observatory is not a top-level page; it is the epistemic chamber that lets Red Team Lab inspect the state of reasoning before a claim advances.
